run_summary.summary: 6 emails scanned across 5 threads. Everything from Apr 22 was already captured in the last run (Yousky $250 cap, Dreo/Govee/Bedsure follow-ups, Wise Block creation). No responses yet from Yaki, Muriel, or Iris. One new item: Popfly sent a campaign notification for Victorinox AG (Swiss Tool X Plus Ratchet) — $5,000 compensation, application deadline April 30. Worth a look before the deadline.

suggestions.message: Popfly just dropped a new campaign: Victorinox Swiss Tool X Plus Ratchet — Professional Trades Creator Campaign. $5,000 compensation, application deadline April 30. You're already on Popfly from the Flexsteel deal. This is a tool/trades-focused campaign so check if it fits your content style, but the dollar amount is strong and the deadline is a week out.
